name: My Last First Kiss
short_description: Even after all these years, you haven’t forgotten about your first love. You try confessing your feelings to him, but he turns you down. Luckily the friends you grew up with are there to help mend your broken heart… until that night, when you become more than just friends…
detailed_description:
This is a Steam version of a hit visual novel game released on the mobile reader app Love 365: Find Your Story by Voltage Inc. It is a collection of romantic, richly illustrated interactive stories with the following premise:

The protagonist is a beginner at love, having held onto a childhood crush all the way into adulthood. A group of her oldest friends reach out to her, helping her to navigate the world of romance - in turn, she comes to see them in an entirely new light. This is a story about the bittersweetness of young love, combined with the excitement of falling head over heels with an old friend.

An opening movie and adventure feature have been added to the Steam release, so even players that have previously read the app version will discover more things to enjoy.

The Story:
Even after all these years, you haven’t forgotten about your first love.
You try confessing your feelings to him, but he turns you down.
Luckily the friends you grew up with are there to help mend your broken heart…
until that night, when you become more than just friends…

Characters:
Ayato Hidaka 　　　"The Likeable Popular Guy"
Ichiya Misono "The Unfriendly Lone Wolf"
Makoto Morimachi "The Loyal Older Brother"
Takamune Kitami "The Passive Soccer Player"
Riku Morimachi "The Quiet Younger Brother"

Contents:
Includes "Main Stories" in the app "Love 365: Find Your Story," up until "Delivering the News"
